project.name: Pura
project.summary: TypeScript immutable-update and persistent-data-structure library that returns native JavaScript types while providing fast immutable operations, benchmarks, docs, and the @sylphx/pura package.

surfaces.name: @sylphx/pura
surfaces.description: Public package surface for Pura immutable update APIs and native-type return contract.

surfaces.name: Repository README
surfaces.description: Public overview, install, API, performance, and release-proof entry point.

surfaces.name: Documentation site
surfaces.description: VitePress docs, API reference, guides, examples, and migration documentation.

surfaces.name: CI
surfaces.description: PR, merge-group, and main validation with build/test plus GroundAtlas package dogfood.

surfaces.name: Release
surfaces.description: Main-branch release workflow calling the shared Sylphx release workflow.

surfaces.name: Doctrine adapter manifest
surfaces.description: Sylphx Doctrine adapter and org-local governance catalog; not the vendor-neutral GroundAtlas default.

commands.name: install
commands.purpose: Install workspace dependencies without lockfile drift.

commands.name: validate
commands.purpose: Run the current build and package test baseline used by CI.

commands.name: test:project-control
commands.purpose: Verify neutral manifest, Doctrine adapter, released GroundAtlas workflow, and release caller boundary.

commands.name: groundatlas:fleet
commands.purpose: Prove the vendor-neutral manifest is selected and generated GroundAtlas JSON/Markdown reports are evidence-only.

adoption.notes: Vendor-neutral GroundAtlas manifest for package/action dogfooding. .doctrine/project.json remains the Sylphx Doctrine adapter and local governance catalog. Generated .groundatlas* files plus GroundAtlas JSON/Markdown reports are evidence/navigation only, not source of truth. Existing lint baseline is tracked as a repo-local adoption gap and is not hidden by this gate.
